idea-plugin.name: Lotus Islands Theme
idea-plugin.description:
Lotus Islands Theme

The beloved Lotus color scheme, beautifully adapted with several enhancements for the new JetBrains Islands UI (2025.3+). Based on the original Lotus Theme from Brian Lai.

Includes a dark theme and light theme.

  • Lotus Islands Dark
  • Lotus Islands Light
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.1.0
  • Lotus Islands Dark:
    • Updated core foreground, background, and border colors for a more refined look
    • Refined typography contrast for better readability of active and muted text
    • Integrated full design system colors including new success and warning states
    • Redesigned status components, including validation tooltips, progress bars, and tool window notifications
    • Adjusted console background and inline parameter hints to match the theme
  • Lotus Islands Light:
    • Overhauled syntax colors and UI elements to ensure high contrast and readability
    • Applied design system colors consistently across all active, hovered, selected, and disabled UI states
